assets.altEn: A grassy slope and flowering trees in Al-Azhar Park overlook Cairo, with two people seated in the shade.

assets.captionAr: مساحة خضراء وإطلالة على المدينة من حديقة الأزهر.

assets.creator: Berthold Werner

assets.creator: Joonas Plaan

assets.creator: Baldiri

assets.creator: Djehouty

assets.creator: Sailko
assets.attribution: Cairo, bab zuweila 01.JPG — Sailko, CC BY 3.0, via Wikimedia Commons
assets.altEn: The arched passage of Bab Zuweila beneath two tall minarets, with vehicles and shops along the street.

assets.placeNameEn: Madrasa and Khanqah of Sultan Barquq

assets.creator: Casual Builder
assets.attribution: Bayn al-Qasrayn2.JPG — Casual Builder, CC BY-SA 3.0, via Wikimedia Commons
assets.altEn: The Bayn al-Qasrayn street frontage, with the Qalawun complex at left and the Barquq complex farther along the street.
